current_phase.label: Host boundary and autonomous development process foundation

current_milestone.label: Create standalone platform repo and codify anti-drift workflow gates

progress_summary: Standalone platform repository has been created and pushed to GitHub at git@github.com:zhaohernando-code/ai-control-platform.git to prevent platform-core work from drifting into managed business projects. Existing Chinese design docs, capability matrix, recovery redesign, and PC/mobile visual drafts are copied into this repo. Host-boundary and project-onboarding gates are active. Current-session platform materials have been migrated into this repo: formal contracts and visuals are active docs, while stock_dashboard autonomous-flow trials/code/tests and root hook route fixes are quarantined under docs/migrations and legacy for platform-neutral refactoring. The current round extended the platform self-trial from text evaluation into machine-readable workflow primitives: run manifest, artifact ledger, task DAG, goal guard, LLM reviewer gate, model router, and workbench projection. The reviewer gate is now a platform data model; Claude+DeepSeek is treated as one provider/model option selected by policy, not a hard-coded workflow. Workbench projection now provides PC/mobile one-screen state input without requiring UI code to parse logs. A durable current-session example input and generated projection fixture now prove the workbench state can be regenerated from persisted JSON.
next_step: Add a projection registry/schema gate so future PC/mobile workbench views can validate projection JSON before rendering.
